values.description: JSON-encoded object of admin-provided configuration values, keyed by namespaced dot-path (e.g. {"agent.approval.mode": "strict"}). Highest priority — overrides user/stored/default values. A JSON string because Chrome's managed-storage schema dialect cannot express an object with arbitrary-typed properties.

lockedKeys.description: Namespaced dot-paths the user/agent cannot change (e.g. "agent.approval.mode"). Locking an ancestor freezes the whole subtree.
